tagline: You built the product. Now automate the business.

levels.name: Getting Started
levels.description: Install Codex and meet the course

modules.title: Welcome & Setup
modules.description: What Codex is, who this course is for, the NovaBrew scenario

levels.name: Fundamentals for Business
levels.description: Master core Codex skills through real business tasks

modules.title: Your First Business Prompt
modules.description: Run your first Codex prompt, understand how it reads and writes files, process the inherited PM notes from NovaBrew

modules.title: File Exploration & Context
modules.description: Navigate messy files like a consultant — parse meeting notes, earnings transcripts, and survey data using Codex

modules.title: Working with Business Files
modules.description: Create, edit, and organize deliverables — financial models, customer analyses, strategy docs — all through Codex

modules.title: Parallel Agents
modules.description: Launch multiple agents simultaneously — market researcher, financial modeler, and UX critic working in parallel on NovaBrew's retention problem

modules.title: Advisors, Skills & Plugins
modules.description: Three ways to extend Codex — advisors give perspective, skills give repeatable workflows, plugins connect outside tools. Assemble an advisory team and arrive at the NovaBrew recommendation.

modules.title: Project Memory
modules.description: Create an AGENTS.md at the root of your workspace so Codex remembers your project context across sessions — no more re-explaining

modules.title: What's Next — From Fundamentals to Building
modules.description: Review what you've learned, preview the vibe-coding module, and prepare your project idea

levels.name: Business Vibe Coding
levels.description: Describe the business outcome, not the code — build and ship a real product

modules.title: Project Setup & Idea Selection
modules.description: Choose your project — NovaBrew retention dashboard, your own startup idea, or a class project — and scaffold it with Codex

modules.title: The Planning Interview
modules.description: Codex runs a Socratic planning session — asks the right questions, surfaces edge cases, and produces a build plan like a senior PM

modules.title: Build & Iterate
modules.description: Build your app by describing what you want in plain English — iterate on UI, features, and business logic without writing code

modules.title: GitHub & Version Control
modules.description: Push your project to GitHub with a professional README — Codex handles git, PRs, and documentation so your repo looks polished

modules.title: Deploy & Go Live
modules.description: Ship to GitHub Pages — get a live URL you can share with professors, investors, or LinkedIn

levels.name: Pre-Launch Toolkit
levels.description: Apply everything to YOUR project — automate marketing and operations for launch

modules.title: Toolkit Kickoff
modules.description: Transition from NovaBrew to your real project — set up project context, choose 2 automations (one marketing, one operations) from the Pre-Launch Toolkit menu

modules.title: Build Your Automations
modules.description: Build both automations end-to-end — deploy marketing artifacts, generate operations intelligence, write before/after reflections for your board memo

modules.title: The Innermost Loop (Optional)
modules.description: Optional bonus — use Codex to modify the course itself. Experience recursive self-improvement and the inner/outer loop framework in action.
